title: cladobium pilosum
side_effects: Cladobium pilosum can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, due to its potential to interact with certain medications or exacerbate underlying conditions. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can also lead to fatigue, headaches, and dizziness. In rare cases, improper use of Cladobium pilosum may cause allergic reactions, such as hives and itching. Additionally, it may also interfere with blood clotting and worsen bleeding disorders if not used under proper medical supervision.
